svg.text: Priority 2 — NRB fintech sandbox + FX reform: full design
Rule 1: Allow registered sandbox companies to
receive USD/EUR payments via virtual accounts
Rule 4: Cap per company: $500K/yr in Tier 2,
NRB needs political cover to issue circulars —
biggest risk is inter-ministry sign-off, not tech
Kenya M-Pesa sandbox: under $2M total build
